title: SIDBI SVCL Legal Officer Recruitment 2025 - Apply Offline
short_info: The SIDBI Venture Capital (SIDBI SVCL) has officially released a recruitment notification for Legal Officer. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply: 29-05-2025 Last Date for Apply: 29-05-2026
